# ALYRA

> ALYRA is a private asset-backed lending business in Australia. It provides discreet, secured loans from $50,000 to $5 million against high-value collateral including luxury watches, jewellery and diamonds, fine art, classic and luxury cars, gold bullion, and designer handbags. Clients keep ownership of the asset, which is held in secure, insured custody for the loan term and returned once the loan is repaid. No public listing, no auction, no obligation.

Key facts:

- Legal entity: ALYRA GROUP PTY LTD (ABN 72 699 671 291)
- Licensed pawnbroker: licence 4817352 (Queensland)
- Second-hand dealer licence: 4817352 (Queensland)
- Loan range: $50,000 – $5,000,000 AUD
- Service area: Australia-wide enquiries — Sydney, Melbourne, Brisbane, Perth, Adelaide, Gold Coast; private appointments by arrangement
- Contact: hello@alyra.com.au (by appointment only)
- Enquiries: https://www.alyra.com.au/valuation/ — confidential valuation request, specialist response typically within one business day

## Asset loans

- [Loans against assets — overview](https://www.alyra.com.au/loans/): How asset-backed loans work across every asset class ALYRA accepts
- [Luxury watch loans](https://www.alyra.com.au/loans/luxury-watches/): Borrow against Rolex, Patek Philippe, Audemars Piguet and other fine watches
- [Jewellery & diamond loans](https://www.alyra.com.au/loans/jewellery-and-diamonds/): Loans secured against fine jewellery, diamonds and precious stones
- [Fine art loans](https://www.alyra.com.au/loans/fine-art/): Lending against paintings, sculpture and collectable art
- [Classic & luxury car loans](https://www.alyra.com.au/loans/classic-and-luxury-cars/): Borrow against classic, exotic and luxury vehicles
- [Gold bullion loans](https://www.alyra.com.au/loans/gold-bullion/): Loans secured against gold and precious-metal bullion
- [Designer handbag loans](https://www.alyra.com.au/loans/designer-handbags/): Lending against Hermès, Chanel and other collectable handbags

## How it works

- [How it works](https://www.alyra.com.au/how-it-works/): The loan process from confidential enquiry to asset return
- [Request a confidential valuation](https://www.alyra.com.au/valuation/): The enquiry form — asset details are reviewed privately, never listed or marketed
- [Security & custody](https://www.alyra.com.au/security-and-custody/): How assets are stored, insured and returned

## Company

- [About ALYRA](https://www.alyra.com.au/about/): Who ALYRA is, entity and licensing details
- [Contact](https://www.alyra.com.au/contact/): Contact details and locations served
- [Insights](https://www.alyra.com.au/insights/): Articles on asset values and collateral lending

## Insights articles

- [What actually determines the value of a fine watch in 2026](https://www.alyra.com.au/insights/what-determines-fine-watch-value/): How a fine watch's realisable value is assessed — brand, reference, condition, originality, documentation, provenance, market demand and sale channel
- [Which prestige car marques actually hold their value in Australia in 2026](https://www.alyra.com.au/insights/which-prestige-car-marques-hold-value-australia/): Which marques retain value in Australia — Ferrari, Porsche, Lamborghini and others — and why model, specification, kilometres, documentation and sale channel decide the real number
- [Gold and bullion as collateral: a practical guide](https://www.alyra.com.au/insights/gold-and-bullion-as-collateral/): How bullion is assessed as lending security — purity, weight, refiner, ownership, allocated vs unallocated storage, lender control, valuation basis, haircuts, liquidity and legal enforceability

## Legal

- [Privacy](https://www.alyra.com.au/privacy/)
- [Terms](https://www.alyra.com.au/terms/)

Important: ALYRA provides loans secured against pledged goods under applicable pawnbroking laws, subject to valuation, approval, custody, and loan terms. Assets are at risk if repayment obligations are not met. General information only — not financial, legal, or credit advice.
